text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, what's wrong, Tannhauser?<n>You're
practically tearing your hair out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Were you making some marvelous plans<n>for the
school? Or do you want to<n>practice sending
letters by arrow?<n>Whatever it is, I'm here to listen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Nature... I'm so worried about<n>how I did
in the unit exam...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, but I'm so worried... The material in<n>the
exam was pretty difficult this time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really hope I didn't fail again! Please<n>don't make
me do any more extra<n>lessons!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What? What's so refreshing about this?!<n>If you
know some secret way of calming<n>down, please
teach meee!
